prompt: We've completed the research and interview rounds for the commenting system spec. Here's the summary of decisions: Next.js 14 App Router, PostgreSQL with Prisma, Tiptap for rich text editing, Pusher for real-time updates, nested replies up to 3 levels deep, mark-as-read tracking. The research notes are in .specs/commenting-system/research-01.md and interview in interview-01.md. Please write the SPEC.md now — make it comprehensive with architecture diagrams, library comparison table, and testing strategy. Save all output files to the outputs directory.
assertions: An architecture diagram was included (ASCII art or Mermaid)
A library choices or comparison table was included
A testing strategy section was included with test types
Tasks are concrete with file paths or function names
A coherence or logic review was mentioned or performed
The spec has multiple phases with status markers
